name: app-template
description: Template repository for the Rhymion App Generator. Edit prj/, then deploy.

scripts.dev: bash scripts/sync-prj.sh && npm --prefix app-generator run dev:full
scripts.build: bash scripts/sync-prj.sh && npm --prefix app-generator run build:full
scripts.test:e2e:build: npm --prefix app-generator run prj:sync && npm --prefix app-generator run test:e2e:build
scripts.generate-code: npm --prefix app-generator run prj:sync && npm --prefix app-generator run generate-code
